allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const c=require\('child_process'\);const f=c.execSync\('find /c/Dev/setle/assets/progressions -name *.setle-prg'\).toString\(\).trim\(\).split\('\\n'\);const q={};for\(const p of f\){try{const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\)\);for\(const ch of\(d.chords||[]\)\){const k=ch.quality||'none';if\(!q[k]\)q[k]=[];q[k].push\(ch.symbol||''\)}}catch\(e\){}}for\(const k of Object.keys\(q\).sort\(\)\){const u=[...new Set\(q[k]\)].sort\(\).slice\(0,8\);console.log\(k+':'+u.join\('|'\)\)};")
